category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Slovakia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入斯洛伐克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入斯洛伐克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Slovakia (ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS) and EU CE framework expectations, including IEC 61851, IEC 62196 Type 2/CCS2 compatibility, electrical protection-device requirements, AFIR obligations, and national installation rules.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与斯洛伐克（ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS）及欧盟CE框架要求对照，涵盖IEC 61851、IEC 62196 Type 2/CCS2兼容性、保护装置要求、AFIR义务和国家安装规则。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與斯洛伐克（ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS）及歐盟CE框架要求對照，涵蓋IEC 61851、IEC 62196 Type 2/CCS2相容性、保護裝置要求、AFIR義務和國家安裝規則。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, electrical-installation design, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and installers should verify current Slovakia (ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS) and EU-CE requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、电气安装设计、并网或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行斯洛伐克（ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS）及欧盟CE相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計、併網或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行斯洛伐克（ÚNMS/ÚRSO/SEPS）及歐盟CE相關要求。

answer_first.en: For Slovakia-bound EV chargers, the most critical gaps are Type 2/CCS2 connector alignment under IEC 62196, compatibility with AFIR obligations as implemented through EU member-state practice, CE conformity evidence under LVD/EMC/RED where in scope, RCD/RDC protection, and Slovakia/ÚRSO installation and grid-operator coordination with SEPS. 230/400 V 50 Hz parameters are required for project readiness. Slovakia is landlocked; primary import gateway is via Hamburg (Germany) or Koper (Slovenia) ports with onward overland transit.
answer_first.zh: 对于斯洛伐克，关键差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2与CCS2接口一致性、成员国实施下AFIR义务、适用范围内的LVD/EMC/RED合规证据、RCD/RDC保护，以及斯洛伐克ÚRSO并网与SEPS项目协调要求。须以230/400 V、50 Hz参数完成交付准备。斯洛伐克为内陆国，主要入境口岸经德国汉堡港或科佩尔港陆路转运。
answer_first.zht: 對於斯洛伐克，關鍵差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2與CCS2介面一致性、會員國實施下AFIR義務、適用範圍內的LVD/EMC/RED合規證據、RCD/RDC保護，以及斯洛伐克ÚRSO併網與SEPS項目協調要求。須以230/400 V、50 Hz參數完成交付準備。斯洛伐克為內陸國，主要入境口岸經德國漢堡港或科佩爾港陸路轉運。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
